query:
UPDATE kafka_trigger
            SET
                kafka_resource_path = $1,
                group_id = $2,
                topics = $3,
                filters = $4,
                filter_logic = $5,
                auto_offset_reset = $6,
                auto_commit = $7,
                script_path = $8,
                path = $9,
                is_flow = $10,
                edited_by = $11,
                permissioned_as = $12,
                edited_at = now(),
                server_id = NULL,
                error = NULL,
                error_handler_path = $15,
                error_handler_args = $16,
                retry = $17
            WHERE
                workspace_id = $13 AND path = $14
